lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: Good day!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there! What are you doing out here?

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: I've been tracking gemstones, and I think I've found a potential source for them!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You have?

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: Yes! A large crab!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right...

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: It moves around a bit, but look! It's right here with us at the moment!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right... And where is this crab?

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: It moves around a bit, but I believe it's currently to the south!

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: Look! The crab is right here with us!

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: I believe the crab is currently to the [direction]!

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: Strange... I've lost track of the crab. I'm sure I'll pick up the trail again shortly.

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: It seems the crab is burrowing at the moment, but I believe it's heading [direction]!

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: Hello again! Look! That large crab is here!

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: Hello again!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you happen to know where that large crab is?

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: I believe it's currently to the north!

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: I believe it's currently to the north east!

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: I believe it's currently to the north west!

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: I believe it's currently to the south!

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: I believe it's currently to the south east!

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: I believe it's currently to the south west!

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: Strange... I've lost track of it. I'm sure I'll pick up the trail shortly.

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: Come on... Something here has to work...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Care for any assistance?

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: Absolutely! I can't seem to find a way into that crevice to continue my scientific endeavour. I don't suppose you could have a dig around?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A scientific dig... Where have I heard of that before?

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: Don't dwell on it too long. There are things I must learn about our world!

sections.title: After digging up the uncut ruby

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found a ruby in the ground.

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: Wondrous! A good sign to be sure! You may keep it, while I will keep the knowledge of what may be here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay...

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: So I'm here... That's there... Then how do we get down there?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Chatting to yourself?

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: Ah, hello there! I'm just pondering on the wonders of geography.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anything I can help you out with?

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: Most certainly. Perhaps you could dig around near the mouth of that nearby cave and elucidate its nature for me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will I get anything for helping?

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: The feeling of satisfaction after helping a scientist in need?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.

sections.title: After digging up the uncut sapphire

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found a sapphire nearby.

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: Outstanding! This can only be seen as a positive! I shall add the knowledge to my reserves. You may keep the gem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you lost?

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: No, my good friend, but I am in a bit of a pickle.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A pickle?

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: Perhaps a jam... Those bandits over there are in the way of scientific discovery!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you like me to deal with them?

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: Well, I'm not averse to a little academic collaboration. I just need some proof that there's something strange here.

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: Is there any chance you could dig near the mouth of that cave for me? Let me know if you find anything.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What should I do with the bandits?

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: I have no qualms with you doing what you must on that front.

sections.title: After digging up the uncut emerald

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found an emerald in the earth.

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: Stupendous! Combined with the other locations, I suspect there may be more to this than meets the eye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right...

lines.speaker: Ru Merald
lines.text: Keep the gem for yourself, as payment for your assistance.
